div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Flywheel AT_SETPOINT
AND Hood AT_SETPOINT
AND drivetrain aligned

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Flywheel loses speed
OR hood loses position
OR alignment lost

span.p:
Flywheel spins to ShotCalculator RPM
Hood moves to ShotCalculator angle
Drivetrain aligns to target
Kicker & Indexer OFF

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Kicker runs at 4500 RPM
Indexer feeds at 40% duty cycle
